Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x051A "CRITICALMASS-0420-051A" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0420 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Critical Mass (Durell).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added RLE packed colour RAM data and routine to unpack at $0420, which allows the intro to be displayed correctly.
